title: Handmade in Tacoma
announcement: Thanks for visiting TacomaWorkshop! All items handmade with care.
vacation_message: The shop is currently closed while I catch up on custom orders and restock supplies. Favorite the shop and I'll send a note the moment new listings go up. Thank you for your patience!
sale_message: Thanks for your order! Every piece is handmade here in Tacoma and packed with care.
digital_sale_message: Thank you for your purchase! Your printable file is attached and ready to download from your Etsy account. If you have any trouble opening it, just send me a message and I'll help right away.
